caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark grey background. She is wearing a light green blouse with a decorative embroidered neckline and a thin dark necklace. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with both hands held in front of her chest. In the first frame, her hands are positioned close together with palms facing inward. As the sequence progresses, she opens her arms wider, moving her hands outward and slightly downward to emphasize her speech. A small logo featuring a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame. The camera remains static in a medium shot, focusing on the woman from the waist up, while her facial expressions and hand movements change fluidly as she delivers her presentation.
